# Session Summary: SuperDesign MCP Installation

**Date:** 2025-12-13
**Project:** Calculator Engine & Planning Agent / APR-Dashboard-v3
**Status:** MCP Installed - Awaiting Restart

---

## Overview

Installed the SuperDesign MCP server for Claude Code to enable a split workflow:
- **SuperDesign** handles visual/UI changes (colors, layouts, buttons)
- **Claude Code** handles functional/logic changes (calculations, state, handlers)

---

## What Was Done

### 1. Searched for SuperDesign Knowledge
- Found knowledge guide created earlier today: `25.12.13 - AI-Driven-UI-Design.md`
- Location: `/Users/bencrowe/Development/01-Knowledge-Base/Learning-transcripts/`
- SuperDesign is an open-source AI design agent that generates UI from natural language

### 2. Installed SuperDesign MCP Server
```bash
# Cloned repo
git clone https://github.com/jonthebeef/superdesign-mcp-claude-code
cd superdesign-mcp-claude-code

# Installed and built
npm install
npm run build

# Added to Claude Code
claude mcp add --scope user superdesign node /Users/bencrowe/Development/superdesign-mcp-claude-code/dist/index.js
```

**Installation Location:** `/Users/bencrowe/Development/superdesign-mcp-claude-code/`

---

## SuperDesign MCP Tools Available

| Tool | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `superdesign_generate` | Create UI designs, wireframes, components, logos, icons |
| `superdesign_iterate` | Refine existing designs with feedback |
| `superdesign_extract_system` | Extract design systems from screenshots |
| `superdesign_gallery` | Generate interactive HTML gallery of all designs |
| `superdesign_list` | List all created designs in workspace |

---

## Planned Use Cases

### Use Case 1: Calculator Demo UI
- Generate and iterate on calculator interface visuals
- Split workflow: SuperDesign for visuals, Claude Code for logic
- Faster iteration than code-only approach

### Use Case 2: Appraisal Report Screenshot to HTML
- Use `superdesign_extract_system` on PDF page screenshots
- Extract colors, typography, spacing, layout patterns
- Generate matching HTML/CSS for report builder
- Improve formatting accuracy for appraisal reports

---

## Action Required

**Restart Claude Code** to activate the MCP:
1. Quit Claude Code completely (Cmd+Q)
2. Restart Claude Code
3. Return to project - `mcp__superdesign__*` tools will be available

---
